description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and clean, rectilinear lines. The structure is composed of two main volumes: a larger primary living area and a smaller detached or semi-detached section, possibly a garage or guest suite, both connected by a broad, open courtyard. Expansive glass windows line the longer facades, allowing for ample natural light and a strong indoor-outdoor connection. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored concrete or stucco and large glass panels, with a prominent flat roof overhang providing shade. A large rectangular pool or water feature is integrated into the courtyard, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout emphasizes openness, minimalism, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, light-colored walls, and a spacious courtyard featuring a rectangular pool. The design is minimalist and emphasizes open, connected living spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, flat-roofed main building, extensive glass windows, and the adjacent pool area.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the depth of the main structure, the smaller detached section, and the pool's proximity to the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the house, the courtyard, and the relationship between the two main volumes.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the smaller section, the open courtyard, and the pool, with the main building in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide glass door, and no visible steps or decorative columns
